description: Var is an intermediate value in a Flow used to transform and/or memoize the result of a computation for reuse.

cache.description: When cache is true var always returns its first non-null memoized value.

switch.description: Given switch statement's first matching case (otherwise default) evaluates to var's memoized value.

value.description: Given expression evaluates to var's memoized value, example: "= inputs.foo.getValue()"

title: Var
